spec.description: Side-by-side bottleneck comparison of two VMCluster test runs. Set testname/testrun for each cluster and use offset_a/offset_b (e.g. "1h") to align runs that happened at different times.

spec.expr: sum(rate(vm_rows_inserted_total{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})) by (testname, testrun) > 0
sum(rate(vm_rows_inserted_total{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})) by (testname, testrun) > 0

spec.description: Total rows/s inserted.
spec.title: Ingestion rate (rows/s)

spec.expr: sum(rate(vm_http_requests_total{job=~"$job_select", path!~"/favicon.ico", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})) by (testname, testrun) > 0
sum(rate(vm_http_requests_total{job=~"$job_select", path!~"/favicon.ico", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})) by (testname, testrun) > 0

spec.description: Read request throughput.
spec.title: vmselect query rate (req/s)

spec.expr: sum(rate(vm_vminsert_metrics_read_total{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})) by (testname, testrun)
sum(rate(vm_vminsert_metrics_read_total{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})) by (testname, testrun)

spec.description: Rows/s received by vmstorage. Gap vs vminsert rate = RPC backpressure.
spec.title: vmstorage ingestion rate (rows/s)

spec.expr: sum(rate(vm_rpc_rows_dropped_on_overload_total{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})) by (testname, testrun)
sum(rate(vm_rpc_rows_dropped_on_overload_total{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})) by (testname, testrun)

spec.description: Data loss rate. Non-zero = vmstorage overloaded or unreachable.
spec.title: Rows lost (RPC)

spec.expr: rate(vm_filestream_write_duration_seconds_total{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a}) / rate(vm_filestream_buffered_write_calls_total{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})

rate(vm_filestream_write_duration_seconds_total{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b}) / rate(vm_filestream_buffered_write_calls_total{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})

spec.description: Average vmstorage filestream write I/O duration per call. Rises when storage is I/O bound.
spec.title: vmstorage avg write I/O duration

spec.expr: max(vm_request_duration_seconds{job=~"$job_select", quantile=~"(0.5|0.99)", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (quantile, testname, testrun) > 0
max(vm_request_duration_seconds{job=~"$job_select", quantile=~"(0.5|0.99)", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (quantile, testname, testrun) > 0

spec.description: Read-path end-to-end latency.
spec.title: vmselect query latency p50 / p99

spec.expr: max(go_gc_duration_seconds{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select|$job_storage", quantile="1", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (pod, testname, testrun)
max(go_gc_duration_seconds{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select|$job_storage", quantile="1", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (pod, testname, testrun)

spec.description: Stop-the-world GC pauses map 1:1 to latency spikes.
spec.title: GC pause duration p100

spec.expr: sum(rate(vm_http_request_errors_total{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})) by (path, testname, testrun) > 0
sum(rate(vm_http_request_errors_total{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})) by (path, testname, testrun) > 0

spec.description: Errors force client retries, inflating perceived latency.
spec.title: HTTP error rate

spec.expr: sum(vm_concurrent_insert_current{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) / sum(vm_concurrent_insert_capacity{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a})

sum(vm_concurrent_insert_current{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) / sum(vm_concurrent_insert_capacity{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b})

spec.description: Sustained > 0.9 = vminsert is the write bottleneck.
spec.title: vminsert insert utilisation (current / capacity)

spec.expr: sum(vm_concurrent_insert_current{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) / sum(vm_concurrent_insert_capacity{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a})

sum(vm_concurrent_insert_current{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) / sum(vm_concurrent_insert_capacity{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b})

spec.description: Near 1.0 = vmstorage CPU saturation, rows queue in RPC buffer.
spec.title: vmstorage insert utilisation (current / capacity)

spec.expr: sum(vm_concurrent_queries{job=~"$job_select", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) / sum(vm_concurrent_select_capacity{job=~"$job_select", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a})

sum(vm_concurrent_queries{job=~"$job_select", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) / sum(vm_concurrent_select_capacity{job=~"$job_select", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b})

spec.description: Near 1.0 = incoming queries throttled, raising tail latency.
spec.title: vmselect concurrent-select utilisation (current / capacity)

spec.expr: sum(vm_rpc_buf_pending_bytes{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (testname, testrun)
sum(vm_rpc_buf_pending_bytes{job=~"$job_insert", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (testname, testrun)

spec.description: Backlog in vminsert→vmstorage RPC send buffer.
spec.title: RPC send queue (pending bytes)

spec.expr: 1 - (sum(rate(vm_cache_misses_total{job=~"$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})) / sum(rate(vm_cache_requests_total{job=~"$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})))

1 - (sum(rate(vm_cache_misses_total{job=~"$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})) / sum(rate(vm_cache_requests_total{job=~"$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})))

spec.description: Lower ratio → more disk I/O per query → higher read latency.
spec.title: Cache hit ratio (all types)

spec.expr: sum(vm_cache_entries{job=~"$job_storage", type="storage/hour_metric_ids", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (testname, testrun)
sum(vm_cache_entries{job=~"$job_storage", type="storage/hour_metric_ids", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (testname, testrun)
sum(rate(vm_new_timeseries_created_total{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})) by (testname, testrun)
sum(rate(vm_new_timeseries_created_total{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})) by (testname, testrun)

spec.description: Cardinality and churn affect cache hit ratio and index lookup latency.
spec.title: Active time series & churn rate

spec.expr: sum(vm_parts{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (type, testname, testrun)
sum(vm_parts{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (type, testname, testrun)

spec.description: More parts = more files merged per range scan → read latency spikes.
spec.title: LSM part count

spec.expr: sum(vm_active_merges{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (type, testname, testrun)
sum(vm_active_merges{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (type, testname, testrun)

spec.description: Concurrent merges consume I/O bandwidth shared with reads.
spec.title: Active merges

spec.expr: sum(rate(process_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_a})) by (pod, testname, testrun)
sum(rate(process_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter}[5m] offset ${offset_b})) by (pod, testname, testrun)

spec.description: Per-pod CPU.
spec.title: CPU usage (cores)

spec.expr: sum(process_resident_memory_bytes{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (pod, testname, testrun)
sum(process_resident_memory_bytes{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (pod, testname, testrun)

spec.description: Memory pressure triggers more frequent GC and cache eviction.
spec.title: Memory usage (RSS)

spec.expr: sum(vm_pending_rows{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (type, testname, testrun)
sum(vm_pending_rows{job=~"$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (type, testname, testrun)

spec.description: In-memory write queue depth. Growth = flush behind ingest.
spec.title: Pending datapoints (storage + indexdb)

spec.expr: sum(go_goroutines{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_a", testrun="$testrun_a", $filter} offset ${offset_a}) by (pod, testname, testrun)
sum(go_goroutines{job=~"$job_insert|$job_select|$job_storage", testname="$testname_b", testrun="$testrun_b", $filter} offset ${offset_b}) by (pod, testname, testrun)

spec.description: Goroutine growth under steady load indicates leaks.
spec.title: Goroutines
VMCluster Bottleneck Comparison
